title: ASCI is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: ASCI is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the ASCI family as a Subject Matter Expert in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ASCI:
ASCI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ASCI!
